title: AS 3600:2018 Concrete Column Design
description: Design of reinforced concrete columns in accordance with AS 3600:2018.

member_label.description: Member Label. Reference name or ID for the column.

D.description: Depth (D). Units: mm. Depth of Section.

W.description: Width (W). Units: mm. Width of Section.

diameter.description: Diameter (D). Units: mm. Diameter of Section.

cover.description: Cover. Units: mm. Concrete cover measured to outside of transverse reinforcement.

size_bars.description: Bar Diameter. Symbol: φ_{long}. Units: mm. Diameter of reinforcement bars.

n_bars_circle.description: Bars. Symbol: N_{long,circ}. Number of bars.

n_bars_z.description: Z-Bars. Symbol: N_{long,z}. Number of bars in each face in the z-direction.

n_bars_y.description: Y-Bars. Symbol: N_{long,y}. Number of bars in each face in the y-direction.

reinforcement_class_long.description: Ductility Class. Symbol: Class_{long}. Ductility class for longitudinal reinforcement.

size_shear_bars.description: Bar Diameter. Symbol: φ_{shear}. Units: mm. Diameter of shear reinforcement bars.

n_shear_bars_y.description: Y-Shear Legs. Symbol: N_{shear,y}. Number of shear legs parallel to the y-axis.Note: Minimum of 2 legs required as external link is always counted.

n_shear_bars_z.description: Z-Shear Legs. Symbol: N_{shear,z}. Number of shear legs parallel to the z-axis.Note: Minimum of 2 legs required as external link is always counted.

s.description: Ligature Spacing. Symbol: s. Units: mm. Ligature spacing along the length of the column.

reinforcement_class_shear.description: Ductility Class. Symbol: Class_{shear}. Ductility class for shear reinforcement.

L.description: L. Symbol: L. Units: mm. Unsupported length of column.

k_y.description: kz. Symbol: k_z. Effective length factor for compression buckling about Z-axis (10.5.3).

k_z.description: ky. Symbol: k_y. Effective length factor for compression buckling about Y-axis (10.5.3).

f_c.description: f'c. Symbol: f'_{c}. Units: MPa. Concrete characteristic compression strength.

f_y.description: fsy. Symbol: f_{sy}. Units: MPa. Characteristic yield strength of steel.

V_y.description: V*y. Symbol: V^*_{y}. Units: kN. Factored design shear load in y-direction.

V_z.description: V*z. Symbol: V^*_{z}. Units: kN. Factored design shear load in z-direction.

N.description: N*. Symbol: N^*. Units: kN. Factored design axial load. (+ve for compression)

G.description: G. Symbol: G. Units: kN. Unfactored permanent axial load. (+ve for compression)

Q.description: Q. Symbol: Q. Units: kN. Unfactored variable axial load. (+ve for compression)

second_order.description: Design Moments. First Order: Provide moments from first-order analysis. This calculator will automatically generate moment magnification factor if the column is slender.User-Defined (including δ): Provide design moments including moment magnification. This option is unavailable for short columns.

M_z.description: M*z. Symbol: M^*_{z}. Units: kN-m. Factored bending moment design load, including second-order effects as per 10.4, about z-axis.

M_y.description: M*y. Symbol: M^*_{y}. Units: kN-m. Factored bending moment design load, including second-order effects as per 10.4, about y-axis.

braced_or_unbraced.description: Braced. Structure is braced against sidesway (external systems provide sufficient restraint to lateral loads).

M_z_top.description: M*z,top. Symbol: M^*_{z,top}. Units: kN-m. Factored moment about the z-axis at the top of the column.

M_z_bot.description: M*z,bot. Symbol: M^*_{z,bot}. Units: kN-m. Factored moment about the z-axis at the bottom of the column.

M_y_top.description: M*y,top. Symbol: M^*_{y,top}. Units: kN-m. Factored moment about the y-axis at the top of the column.

M_y_bot.description: M*y,bot. Symbol: M^*_{y,bot}. Units: kN-m. Factored moment about the y-axis at the bottom of the column.

sway_moment_magnification_factor_y.description: δsy. Symbol: δ_{sy}. Moment magnification factor for sway (δs) in the direction of the y-axis as per 10.4.3(b).

sway_moment_magnification_factor_z.description: δsz. Symbol: δ_{sz}. Moment magnification factor for sway (δs) in the direction of the z-axis as per 10.4.3(b).

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
